name: Papa’s Pancakeria
author: Poki
description: Work at a pancake restaurant with Cooper and Prudence! Take orders from hungry customers, and visit the grill station. Cook pancakes with fresh batter, and customize each order at the build station. Stack pancakes together, add toppings, and serve your customers! How to play Papa's Pancakeria? Use the to navigate your way trough the kitchen and make the best pancakes! Who created Papa's Pancakeria Papa's Pancakeria is created by Flipline Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Papa's Burgeria , Papa's Freezeria , Papa's Pizzeria and Jacksmith How can I play Papa's Pancakeria for free? You can play Papa's Pancakeria for free on Poki. Can I play Papa's Pancakeria on mobile devices and desktop? Papa's Pancakeria can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
